https://smaartcompany.com/
Your income tax responsibility is not delegable.

Even if you hire an accountant, you are ultimately responsible for what is filed, what is paid, and whether deadlines are met.

That includes:
• Filing accuracy
• Timely payments
• Proper reporting

There are limited cases where an accountant may be held accountable under reasonable cause, but only if you can show you acted responsibly.

That means you:
• Chose a competent professional
• Provided all required documents on time
• Maintained clear communication
• Had reason to trust the work was being handled properly

Working with the right advisor matters, but staying informed and involved matters just as much.

If you want guidance you can rely on, call (305) 819-3675. https://www.instagram.com/reel/DWEpdkuCpbY/
